title: Blade Runner
review: The definitive cyberpunk film. "All those moments will be lost in time, like tears in rain."

title: The Matrix
review: Red pill or blue pill? Revolutionary visual effects and philosophy wrapped in action.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
tagline: An epic drama of adventure and exploration
review: Cinema as visual poetry. HAL 9000 is still the most unsettling AI in film history.

title: Arrival
review: Linguistics saves the world. A beautiful meditation on time, language, and choice.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
review: Absurdist multiverse mayhem that's secretly about family, kindness, and finding meaning. Surprisingly moving.
